events.title: The Wizard of Oz (Spring Musical) — Evening Performance
events.location: Woodside High Auditorium, 150 Education Drive, Woodside, CA 94062
events.description:
Woodside High School Drama Department Spring Musical production: “The Wizard of Oz”.

Showtime: Friday, April 3, 2026 at 7:00 PM (doors open 30 minutes before showtime).

Tickets: Adults $15; Students/Seniors $10; Children under 5 free. Purchase online at https://woodsidedrama.org/tickets or at the door (cash/card accepted). Concessions available at intermission.
